title: Accept Beta/Gamma as Frozen, Advance to Stage 3

content.choice: Accept beta/gamma as irreducible frozen frame elements, focus Stage 3 on alpha adaptation rate
alternatives: Continue searching for beta/gamma local proxy
content.rationale: Three approaches exhausted: (1) analytical proxy gradient failed, (2) local proxy search failed (7 tested), (3) per-cell decomposition failed (53% loss). Finite-diff MI works but violates Principle II
